name: cross-gen-retrieval-drift.year_mismatch
expression:
span.attributes["ai_o11y.usecase"] == "cross-gen-retrieval-drift"
and span.attributes["retrieval.query_year"] != null
and span.attributes["retrieval.selected_year"] != null
and span.attributes["retrieval.query_year"]
    != span.attributes["retrieval.selected_year"]
